changeSet.author: migration
changeSet.comment: Migrate style from users.style column to user_settings.settings hstore
changeSet.sql:
-- Update existing user_settings rows: merge style from users.style into settings hstore UPDATE user_settings us SET settings = us.settings || hstore('style', u.style) FROM users u WHERE us.id = u.id AND u.id != 2;
-- Insert user_settings for users who don't have one yet (skip anonymous) INSERT INTO user_settings (id, settings, main) SELECT id, hstore('style', style), NULL FROM users WHERE id != 2 AND id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM user_settings);

changeSet.author: migration
changeSet.comment: Drop users.style column after migration to user_settings
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN style;
